title: Kolusum Illa Lyrics Inam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kolusum Illa
Singer(s): Vishal C
Movie: Inam
Music: Vishal C
Lyrics: Charukesh

Kolusum Illa sangili illa
thodum illa kadhula.
Nikkura paaru sirikki mava
thathaa thaluva kannaala

Koodayila medhakkuren
nilava pol neliyuren
moodum paniya pola muthu muthaaga
Verkkum mugatha paarthu
mayakkam thannaala.

Venumnu kadathura elamaya
alukkuren.
thotta siningi pola motta moodaadha
vandu kerangi nikka
vittu odaadha

Elama eravu irandum irukkave
arugae varave alli serthukka
Odambu udhadu edhukku idaiveli
usure usure muththam pottukka

Kolusum Illa sangili illa
thodum illa kadhula.
Nikkura paaru sirikki mava
thathaa thaluva kannaala

Kannakuliyila muthamidayila
mella mella rusi pidikkudhe
idhaloram muthamani pallu kadikka.

Kadhu madalila moochu padayila
michamulla vetkam alaiyudhe
Mazhai kandadhu malare

Elama eravu irandum odhavave
kanavu nenavu rendum pinnikka
odambu udhadu enga pochu idaiveli
usurum usurum onnu sendhukka

Kolusum Illa sangili illa
thodum illa kadhula.
Nikkura paaru sirikki mava
thathaa thaluva kannaala

Melum povadharkku manam thudikkudhu
neram kalam thadai vidhikkudhe
idayil vida pennin manam marukka

Meendum sarappogum naalu
eppozhudhu kelvi mattum ingu minjudhe
viraivil annaal varumo

Elama eravu irandum irukkave
arugae varave alli serthukka
Odambu udhadu edhukku idaiveli
usure usure muththam pottukka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kolusum Illa?

The song explores themes of longing and nostalgia, capturing a sense of emotional depth.

Who is the singer of Kolusum Illa?

The song is sung by Vishal C.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kolusum Illa?

The lyrics were penned by Charukesh.

What is the release year of the movie Inam?

The movie was released in 2014.

What emotions does Kolusum Illa evoke?

The song evokes feelings of melancholy and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kolusum Illa from the movie Inam is a soulful melody that delves into themes of longing and nostalgia. Sung by Vishal C, the song's poignant lyrics by Charukesh add depth to its melancholic tone. It beautifully captures the essence of emotional turmoil and reflection, making it a perfect accompaniment for moments of introspection. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics leave a lasting impact on the listener.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the hauntingly beautiful Kolusum Illa from the movie Inam, where Vishal C's soulful voice meets Charukesh's poignant lyrics. This song captures the essence of longing and nostalgia, making it a memorable piece. Dive into the emotional depth of this melody and let it transport you to another world.
stanzaMeanings: No anklets, no chains, no earrings in the ear. Look at him standing, smiling, grandpa nodding with his eyes.
I float like a cloud, I melt like the moon. Like dew drops, I sweat. Looking at the face, I feel dizzy.
I want to gather everything, I am restless. Like a butterfly that doesn't close its wings, I am restless and can't stay still.
The night and youth are here, come closer and join together. Why is there a gap between the body and lips? Let's kiss and unite.
No anklets, no chains, no earrings in the ear. Look at him standing, smiling, grandpa nodding with his eyes.
A kiss on the cheek, slowly tasting it. Biting the pearl-like teeth on the lips.
Breath on the ear, the remaining shyness is wandering. The flower saw the rain.
The night and youth are here to help, dreams and reality are mixing. Where did the body and lips go? Let's unite the breaths.
No anklets, no chains, no earrings in the ear. Look at him standing, smiling, grandpa nodding with his eyes.
The heart is eager to go further, but time and circumstances are obstacles. In between, the girl's heart hesitates.
When will the day come again? Only questions remain here. Will that day come soon?
The night and youth are here, come closer and join together. Why is there a gap between the body and lips? Let's kiss and unite.
No anklets, no chains, no earrings in the ear.
